allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Remove budget tracking, guest directory, and RSVP management from features *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add comprehensive features list to landing page *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Replace WhatsApp emoji with official SVG logos *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Update WhatsApp icons with proper official logo design *)

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing; if \($response.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✓ Page loaded successfully \(200\)"; if \($response.Content -match '<form'\) { Write-Host "✓ Form found in HTML" } else { Write-Host "✗ No form found in HTML" } } else { Write-Host "✗ Status code: $\($response.StatusCode\)" } } catch { Write-Host "✗ Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "✓ Page loaded \(Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)\)"; if \($response.Content -match '<form'\) { Write-Host "✓ Form HTML found"; if \($response.Content -match 'value="email"'\) { Write-Host "✓ Email input found" } } } catch { Write-Host "✗ Error: $\($_.Exception.Message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(150, $_.Exception.Message.Length\)\)\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "✓ Page loaded \(Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)\)"; Write-Host "✓ Content length: $\($response.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Host "✗ Error: $\($_.Exception.Message.Substring\(0, 100\)\)" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "✓ Signin page loaded successfully!" } catch { $err = $_.Exception.Message; if \($err.Length -gt 100\) { $err = $err.Substring\(0, 100\) }; Write-Host "✗ Error: $err" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "✓ Signin page loaded successfully!"; if \($response.Content -match 'Welcome Back'\) { Write-Host "✓ Found welcome message" } } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "✓ Signin page loaded successfully!"; if \($response.Content -match 'Welcome Back'\) { Write-Host "✓ Contains welcome message" } } catch { Write-Host "Still loading..." })
